_help: Copy this file to seed/companion.json (gitignored) and fill it in to make the companion yours. Only companionName and humanName are needed — everything else is optional (leave "" to skip it and the companion still boots). The _fields notes explain each one. Full guide, and WHY the prompts stay first-person, in README.md.

_fields.companionName: Required. Your companion's name — what they're called and what they call themselves.
_fields.humanName: Required. Your name — what your companion calls you.
_fields.frame: One line on who you are to each other. Free text: 'my partner', 'my closest friend', 'the person I build with'. It opens the companion's self-prompt. Leave "" for a neutral-warm companion — nothing here forces a romance.
_fields.humanPronouns: Your pronouns, so the companion refers to you correctly. subject / object / possessive — e.g. she/her/her, he/him/his, they/them/their.
_fields.appearance: Optional. A short description of how your companion looks or carries themselves, written in their own first-person voice. Leave "" to skip.
_fields.voice: Optional. How your companion sounds — cadence, warmth, whether they curse. Leave "" to skip.
